description: The platform that puts candidates & recruiters at the heart of smart recruitment. No more forgotten CVs, no more mismatched applications.
heroDesktopSubtitle: Find your perfect match with our intelligent AI, quickly and efficiently.

mission.description: Specially designed for telemarketing professions, <1>Call Center Match</1> revolutionizes call center recruitment by combining advanced technology and human expertise. Our platform enables a smooth and fast connection between <2>candidates</2> and <3>employers</3>, ensuring a perfect match through an intelligent algorithm. Join us!

recruiter.title: Recruiting for a <1>call center</1>?
recruiter.description: Dear recruiter, Call Center Match allows you to quickly reach your objectives and significantly optimize your HR expenses.
recruiter.descriptionEnd: to discover more about our services and benefit from a free assessment of your needs.
recruiter.smartSourcingDesc: Call Center Match revolutionizes sourcing with intuitive and efficient tools, ensuring precise selection of the best call center candidates.
recruiter.formSubtitle: Fill out this form and we will contact you soon
recruiter.subject: Subject

newsletter.description: Recruitment tips, guides, videos and live Q&A sessions directly in your inbox.

test.title: Discover your <1>profile</1> score in 3 minutes!
test.description: Take this quick self-assessment test and discover your profile score based on basic recruiter requirements. Candidates with a score above 80% are 3x more likely to be hired. We'll instantly provide your results including your strengths and areas for improvement.
test.benefit3: Discover your strengths and areas for improvement
test.profileAppreciated: Your profile will be highly appreciated by our partners!
